features.name: Chat
features.description: Real-time chat via WebSocket gateway protocol with streaming responses

features.name: Pulse Cards
features.description: Proactive notification cards grouped by category with swipe-to-dismiss, card stacks, and agent badges

features.name: Pulse Card Expansion
features.description: Tap-to-expand cards with full markdown reports. Report cards carry an expanded_body field and optional action buttons. The app renders a detail sheet with the complete content.

features.name: Pulse Channels
features.description: Canonical categories, origin field, and delivery mode awareness for Pulse channel routing

features.name: Calendar
features.description: Calendar tab with Month and Agenda views. Renders events from the calendar API including full Google Calendar multi-calendar sync with native colors. The id field must be a string. Date format: ISO 8601 with offset for timed events, YYYY-MM-DD for all-day.

features.name: Voice
features.description: On-device voice input via Apple Speech (SFSpeechRecognizer) and voice output via ElevenLabs TTS or Apple AVSpeechSynthesizer. Entirely client-side — no server changes required. Per-agent Voice ID and playback speed configurable in Agents tab.

features.name: Web Apps
features.description: Agent-generated standalone HTML apps served in WKWebView, listed with pull-to-refresh and frequency sorting

features.name: Skills Display
features.description: View and manage agent skills from OpenPot. Reads skill list via gateway WebSocket, displays installed and bundled skills with status and requirements. Accessible within the Agents tab.

features.name: SSH Terminal
features.description: In-app SSH terminal via SwiftTerm with ed25519 keypair authentication

features.name: Settings
features.description: App settings accessible via the gear icon in the agent dock. Includes gateway configuration, connection management, appearance options, and voice output picker (ElevenLabs / System Voice / Off) with API key storage.
